title: Collaborator
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Collaborator''
(''Hrosha-Gul'') |designer= |manufacturer=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |line= |model=[[Yorik-stronha]] |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=[[Battle of Esfandia]] |affiliation=*[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] *[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers=*[[Jagged Fel]] *[[Arth Gxin]] *[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] *[[Tahiri Veila]] |registry= |aliases= }} The '''''Collaborator''''', originally the '''''Hrosha-Gul''''' (''Price of Pain'' in the [[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|Yuuzhan Vong]]) was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yorik-stronha]] picket ship analog. It was rechristened the ''Collaborator'' by [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] when it was captured for the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. Solo, [[Tahiri Veila]], [[Jagged Fel]], and [[Arth Gxin]] made use of it during the [[Battle of Esfandia]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{Interlang |de=Collaborator |es=Colaboradora }} [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Alliance]] [[Category:Yorik-stronha]]
